meta.title: Growth Team — Project Map
meta.team_summary: Growth Team · 7 người · 2 pods · Full-stack App Growth
meta.subtitle: Project Map & Scope of Work

pods.label: P1
pods.name: App Acquisition & Activation
pods.description: App Growth toàn diện — hands-on chạy paid acquisition, explore kênh mới, đo activation quality, drive web-to-app conversion. Mục tiêu: bring in new app users có chất lượng và đảm bảo họ activate trong 7 ngày đầu.
pods.note: ✦ New channel explore: budget ≤15%, time-box 6–8 tuần/kênh

personnel.name: TBH
personnel.description: App Acquisition · L1→L2 · Web-to-app. Owns paid install campaigns, ASA, activation dashboard, onboarding.

personnel.name: My Lê Ngọc Thảo
personnel.description: Set up & monitor CRM acquisition & activation flows theo brief Senior #1.

pods.footer_note: 👥 Both peers — same reporting line to MKT Manager. Senior #1 và Senior #2 report trực tiếp lên MKT Manager.

projects.name: Paid App Install — PTY, JOB, GDS, VEH
projects.tagline: Acquire new app users với quality cao qua paid channels — 4 verticals
projects.description: Chạy paid app install campaigns cho cả 4 verticals, mỗi vertical dẫn về custom store page riêng. PTY và JOB đã active từ T1/2026 trên account mới. GDS và VEH chưa bắt đầu do chưa có brief. ASA đã paperwork xong và setup trong T2.

tasks.label: PTY — campaign trên account mới, dẫn về custom store
JOB — campaign trên account mới, dẫn về custom store
ASA — paperwork, email approval, setup, air 03/02
Scale camp có RR D1 ≥ 30%, tắt camp xấu
ABR → DWH mapping aaid (đang investigate lệch số)
GDS + VEH — campaign in-app (mass_install, make_lead, adview_7d)
Clarify KPI Q2 per vertical với Đạt

blockers: GDS & VEH chưa có brief từ vertical
Lệch số ABR vs GA4/DWH — đang investigate aaid mapping

projects.name: Web-to-App Conversion
projects.tagline: Tận dụng SEO/organic web traffic có high-intent, chuyển sang app install qua deeplink
projects.description: Channel đã bị drop từ T6/2023. App frequency ~6 sessions/month cao gấp 4x web (~1.5/month). Khi user click Social ad, Social platform mở Web-in-App (chưa login) → friction lớn.

tasks.label: Investigate số view/impression/click bị bé với dev & ABR
Build dashboard/chart track Web→App source
Deeplink từ Social → chỉ mở Web-in-App (chưa native app)

blockers: Dev fix tracking — đã có solution, chờ release & test
Deeplink issue: đang sync #ct-airbridge-mkt-protech, chờ dev confirm timeline

projects.name: Login & Signup (Force Login)
projects.tagline: Uplift % login MAU từ 7.63% → 12%+. Done Q4/2024, đang maintain.
projects.description: Project quan trọng nhất 2025. 2 force login triggers: (1) khi user make_lead, (2) khi >5 adview/ngày. Post-login: content cards D1-D2 educate Location + Save. Hiện maintain mode.

tasks.label: Force Login Lead
Force Login Adview
Content Cards D1-D2
Login Campaign

open_questions: 2026 strategy: maintain ~10% hay tiếp tục drive lên 12%+?
Google Auth nên unblock không? Cần check ProTech feasibility.

projects.name: App Activation — First 7 Days
projects.tagline: Target: ≥20 adviews hoặc 1 lead trong D7. Uplift 32% → 50% (T6) → 60% (T12)
projects.description: Project lớn nhất của App Growth. Hiện 32% activated (85% target). Non-activated users = 40% new users daily, 60% từ Direct. Buyer activation path: Adview → Similar → Search Filter → Login → Lead → Load More.

tasks.label: Activation dashboard (% user_20adview)
OnFlow 6 campaigns (segment 5-19 adviews)
PROD Analysis 'How to activate new user in first 7 days'
Activation tooltips — define content cho từng action
Dashboard breakdown by acquisition source + activation campaign
Survey D7 (2-3 câu cho user chưa đủ 20 adviews)

key_insights: Distinctive activation: Chat → Save Features → Follow profile → Lead → interact video. Users 'Save' = highest diff. giữa high & low RR.
blockers: ZNS + Email chưa auto — cần email platform mới
Product onboarding improvement ở Product side (Nhung)

projects.name: Onboarding Flow
projects.tagline: First-run UX: location first, educate key features cho new users D1-D8
projects.description: Đã experiment và proven onboarding uplift activation. Approach: popup location first → educate Save → guide Search/Filter → make_lead. in-app cards visibility <5% impressions, notification reach chỉ ~15% users đã allow.

tasks.label: Popup onboarding flow (location first) — live
Research post-launch + experiment result — FINAL
Content cards D1-D2: Educate Location, Save
Product (Nhung) discovery — propose solutions improve journey
Email drip series D1-D5 (fallback cho user chưa open noti)
Test incentive nhẹ bật noti (badge, xu, mini event)

pods.label: P2
pods.name: Engagement, Retention & Experiments
pods.description: Own toàn bộ funnel L3→L4. Experiment architect — đề xuất và run A/B experiments tăng DAU, retention, make_lead. Primary product liaison cho ProTech. Chạy paid out-app campaigns và xây engagement mechanics dài hạn.
pods.note: ✦ New channel explore: budget ≤15%, time-box 6–8 tuần/kênh

personnel.name: TBH (handover từ Đạt)
personnel.description: Engagement · Retention · Experiments. Own L3→L4. Experiment architect. Primary product liaison với ProTech.

personnel.name: Kiet Huynh
personnel.description: Paid ads out-app → tăng DAU w lead per vertical. Campaign management PTY, JOB, VEH, GDS.

personnel.name: Binh Nguyen Thanh
personnel.description: CRM engagement & retention flows. Push notification execution theo brief Senior #2.

projects.name: Social Acquisition
projects.tagline: Seeding listings chất lượng lên Social channels qua N8N automation để drive app installs
projects.description: Facebook: 28h21'/tháng vs Chợ Tốt 4 session/tháng. Strategy: auto-post 200 quality listings (score >70)/ngày lên FB Groups, Fanpage, Zalo Groups qua N8N pipeline.

tasks.label: N8N pipeline auto-post 200 listings/ngày — live
Report Fanpage SĐTCT & XLGM
Research & compare channels — Thuy/Trâm
Estimate impact/contribution per channel

projects.name: Chatbot on Social
projects.tagline: AI Chatbot FB/Zalo: detect intent → guide mua hàng → nurture Social → App install
projects.description: Facebook 28h21'/tháng vs Chợ Tốt 4 session/tháng — Social là touchpoint quan trọng nhất để acquire. Chatbot làm '1-stop point'. Đã build basic flows, chờ deploy Production.

tasks.label: Chào hỏi, About CT, Đăng bán, Policy flows — live
Intent detection + classification workflow
Deploy lên Production — follow Nguyên
Kinh nghiệm mua hàng flow
Link tải app / mở app từ chatbot
Cơ chế tự học (auto-expand use cases)
STOP / CONTINUE / GẶP TƯ VẤN VIÊN mechanic

blockers: Chatbot memory architecture — cần advise từ Thiện

projects.name: Campaign Performance — Digital Ads
projects.tagline: Ongoing monthly budget per vertical (DAU/DwL) + sync với Brand MKT campaign theo theme
projects.description: 2 chế độ: (1) Ongoing monthly — budget allocated per vertical cho DAU/DwL campaigns (Google AWO, DWL, Facebook/IG). (2) MKT Campaign mode — khi Brand lead một campaign lớn, Growth sync budget để chạy cùng theme. Bao gồm Livestream 6 phiên/tháng.

tasks.label: PTY + JOB — KPI & Budget 2026, structure campaign AWO
VEH Hero SKU support campaign — đã air, đang review kết quả
Clarify KPI Q2 per vertical với Đạt
JOB: creative testing Facebook + push by job type
Livestream: vận hành 6 phiên/tháng, plan Q2
Biz Obj 2: Tăng tỉ lệ user vào app make_lead từ Paid
PTY: Fix make_lead conversion goal với Dung

projects.name: Save & Continue — Feature Optimization
projects.tagline: Optimize Save Ad + Save Search UX để tăng engagement và lead rate
projects.description: Data: users có Save → lead 46.7% vs không Save 22.1%. Research đã identify 3 UX issues. Cần Product propose solutions và MKT educate users về giá trị Save.
issues_found: Save button ở top, user cần save sau khi xem xong (bottom)
Save Search entry point sai moment

tasks.label: Research Save Search & Save Ad — FINAL (Feb 2025)
Digital ads test event Save + Chat
Product propose solutions từ research findings
Revamp user profile/homepage → tạo 'save habit'
Email + Noti educate Save value cho new users

projects.name: Collections & MF-Experience
projects.tagline: Build 'my-self' behaviors: My Assets, My Activities, My Good Deals, My Shop, Nearby
projects.description: 2025 Engagement Plan focus area. Tạo 'my-self' behaviors để user cảm thấy app là của họ. Key mechanics: Save + Collection + Comparison → better consideration → make_lead.

tasks.label: 1st collection campaign + report
2nd education campaign — Nearby (Noti)
Dashboard collection (theo Jacky's input)
LP Experience — Collection không continue được
LP Map — không continue được
Viết BRD mới cho Landing Page Experience

blockers: LP Collection và Map 'không continue được' — cần BRD mới
Search + Reco algorithm improvement ở Product side (in-progress)

projects.name: Campaign New UI + Buyer Journey Integration
projects.tagline: New UI proven: Lead +10.75%, Adview +12.59%. Buyer journey integration ongoing.
projects.description: Campaign New UI đã prove significant uplift trên tất cả engagement metrics. Buyer Journey: Discovery → Consideration → Connecting → Dealing. Tích hợp Email/Noti/Ads vào từng stage.

tasks.label: Campaign New UI experiment + results measured
Buyer Value Proposition documented per vertical
Email + Noti integration vào buyer journey stages
Personalized content treatment theo buyer stage

projects.name: Video Ads — Buyer & Seller
projects.tagline: Video format để tăng engagement + retention. Buyer tested T11, Seller paused.
projects.description: Video là format high-engagement phù hợp với mục tiêu P2. Buyer: đã test catalog video và 'Xem video nhận quà' (T11/2025). Seller: chưa define value prop + incentive.
buyer_done: 'Xem video nhận quà' campaign — test & operation
projects.seller_status: Paused — chưa define value prop + incentive cho seller
next_steps: Define GTM plan Video Standalone 2026 cho Buyer
Define value prop + incentive offer cho Seller video
Explore Creatomate pipeline cho Social Video automation

projects.name: Deeplink + User Profile BRD
projects.tagline: Fix deeplink Social→Web-in-App. User Profile feature BRD chưa viết.
projects.description: Deeplink từ Social chỉ mở Web-in-App (không phải native app) → friction lớn. Đã sync requirement với #ct-airbridge-mkt-protech, chờ dev confirm timeline.

tasks.label: Sync requirement + example use cases với Airbridge/ProTech
Dev confirm timeline deeplink fix — chờ response
Viết BRD cho User Profile feature

blockers: Dev chưa confirm timeline (expect trước Tết → bị trễ)
User Profile BRD chưa được viết — open question cho incoming PIC

projects.name: CRM / Lifecycle MKT
projects.tagline: Campaigns drive DAU with lead — segmented by behavior, all verticals
projects.description: Các CRM campaigns chạy ongoing để drive DAU with lead (DwL) per vertical. Sử dụng OnFlow/UCDP để segment theo behavior (e.g. Save chưa Lead, Adview nhiều chưa Chat) và execute qua Push Noti, Email, ZNS. Phối hợp với Paid team khi có MKT campaign lớn để amplify.

shared_tools.name: OnFlow & UCDP — incl. Email & ZNS
shared_tools.tagline: Multi-channel CRM automation engine — Push Noti, Content Card, In-App, Email, ZNS, Zalo OA
shared_tools.description: OnFlow là backbone của toàn bộ Growth automation. Email và ZNS là channels nằm trong OnFlow. UCDP hỗ trợ segmentation và personalization. Email experiments: JOB 13% / GDS 18% / VEH 37% open rate D1.

p1: Email/ZNS drip fallback cho users chưa allow noti
Re-engage new users chưa activated sau D7
p2: Email/ZNS retention: saved ads update, price alert, buyer journey stages

Build Email platform: advanced features (automation, A/B, dynamic content)

blockers: Metrics sai trên OnFlow — ảnh hưởng reporting và decision making

UI setup cho EMAIL + OA chưa sẵn sàng để biz trigger tự động

shared_tools.name: Rewards & Incentives — BRD
shared_tools.tagline: Self-serve Promotion & Quest Engine — MKT độc lập không cần dev 4+ tuần/campaign
shared_tools.description: MKT hiện không thể chạy reward campaign không có engineering. BRD finalized 11 requirements. Rewards là công cụ quan trọng để activate new behaviors ở cả P1 lẫn P2.

p1: Incentivize first actions: Save, Lead, Login
Reward new users hoàn thành onboarding

Product estimate timeline và dev roadmap
